summary: Trimmed the opening's duplicated transit beat so Chapter 4 now enters on Lale's sensory arrival inside Tovin's eel house, preserving the same scene while handing off more cleanly from Chapter 3. The exit already fed directly into Chapter 5's floorboard-born singing beat, so no closing change was needed.
edits: Rewrote the opening sentence to start inside the eel house instead of repeating the move up from the gate already announced at the end of Chapter 3.
Kept the chapter ending unchanged because Daro's attention to the hitch under Tovin's floorboards already transitions cleanly into Chapter 5.
